title: read only does not protect this table
poc: ALTER TABLE my_table SET READ ONLY;
CREATE TABLE my_table AS SELECT 1 AS my_column WITH DATA;
key_bug_features: READ ONLY setting does not prevent table modifications
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE test_table SET READ ONLY;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
